goal.description: One-sentence description of the task objective.

steps.description: Detailed, ordered list of implementation steps.

affected_files.description: List of files that will be created or modified.

acceptance_criteria.description: Specific, testable conditions that must be met.

rollback_plan.description: Steps to revert changes if issues arise.

template_example.goal: Add user authentication to the API
template_example.context: The API currently has no authentication. We need JWT-based auth for protected endpoints.

steps.description: Create auth module with JWT token generation and verification
Add auth middleware to FastAPI application
Write unit tests for auth flow with >= 85% coverage

acceptance_criteria: POST /login returns a valid JWT token for correct credentials
Protected endpoints reject requests without a valid token
make verify passes with ruff, pytest, and coverage >= 85%
rollback_plan: Revert changes in pyproject.toml and run pip install -e '.[dev]'
Restore src/api/main.py from last git commit
Run make verify to confirm clean state
